description: Formula of a 'pesuka de-gita' - bill of divorce (get) by proxy, written by Hillel b. Eli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). This formula is unique as it approved the scribe as a witness, according to the Babylonian (and later the Egyptian) halakha, as opposed to the Palestinian one. See Y. David, The divorce among the Jews, I, p. 16. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
